sentences.sentence: The Arctic is an area located at the northernmost part of the Earth and includes the Arctic Ocean, Canada, Russia, Greenland, the United States, Norway, Sweden, Finland and Iceland.
sentences.translation: 北极是位于地球最北端的区域，包括北冰洋、加拿大、俄罗斯、格陵兰、美国、挪威、瑞典、芬兰和冰岛。

structure.text: located at the northernmost part of the Earth
and includes the Arctic Ocean, Canada, Russia, Greenland, the United States, Norway, Sweden, Finland and Iceland

difficult_points: located... 是过去分词短语，后置修饰 an area。
is 和 includes 由 and 连接，共用主语 The Arctic；后者接长串并列宾语。

sentences.sentence: It consists of an ice-covered ocean, surrounded by treeless permafrost.
sentences.translation: 它由一片冰雪覆盖的海洋构成，四周环绕着没有树木的永久冻土。
difficult_points: It 回指 The Arctic；consist of 表示由某些部分构成。
surrounded by... 是过去分词短语，修饰 ocean 并补充其周边环境。

sentences.sentence: The area can be defined as north of the Arctic Circle, the approximate limit of the midnight sun and the polar night.
sentences.translation: 这一地区可界定为北极圈以北；北极圈大致是午夜太阳和极夜现象的界线。

structure.text: the approximate limit of the midnight sun and the polar night

difficult_points: define A as B 的被动形式说明北极区域的地理界定。
逗号后的名词短语是 Arctic Circle 的同位语，解释其作为自然现象界线的意义。

sentences.sentence: The average temperature in July, which is the warmest month, is below 10°C.
sentences.translation: 最温暖的月份七月，其平均气温也低于10摄氏度。
difficult_points: which 引导非限制性定语从句，补充说明 July。
句子主干需跳过插入从句理解为 The average temperature... is below 10°C。

sentences.sentence: Colder summer temperatures cause the size, abundance, productivity and variety of plants to decrease.
sentences.translation: 更低的夏季气温会使植物的体型、数量、生产力和多样性下降。

structure.text: the size, abundance, productivity and variety of plants

difficult_points: cause + 宾语 + to do 表示使某事发生变化。
of plants 同时修饰 size、abundance、productivity 和 variety 四个并列名词。

sentences.sentence: Trees cannot grow in the Arctic, but in its warmest parts, shrubs are common and can reach 2 metres in height.
sentences.translation: 树木无法在北极生长，但在北极最温暖的地区，灌木很常见，最高可达2米。

structure.text: Trees cannot grow in the Arctic
and can reach 2 metres in height

difficult_points: but 对比北极没有树木与较温暖地区仍有灌木。
its 回指 the Arctic；are common 与 can reach 共用主语 shrubs。

sentences.sentence: A thick blanket of snow lies several feet deep all over the ground.
sentences.translation: 厚厚的积雪像毯子一样铺满地面，深达数英尺。
difficult_points: a blanket of snow 是比喻，描绘积雪连续覆盖地面。
several feet deep 是量度补语，说明积雪深度。

sentences.sentence: The sun appears for only a few brief hours each day before sinking below the horizon as blackness cloaks the land.
sentences.translation: 太阳每天只短暂出现几个小时，随后便沉入地平线下，与此同时黑暗笼罩大地。

structure.text: appears for only a few brief hours each day

difficult_points: before sinking... 是介词后动名词结构，逻辑主语仍是 the sun。
as 引导时间从句，表示太阳落下时黑暗同时笼罩大地。

sentences.sentence: As it vanishes, a bitter chill tightens its grip.
sentences.translation: 随着太阳消失，刺骨严寒变得愈发强烈。
difficult_points: it 回指上一句的 the sun；as 表示两个变化同步发生。
tightens its grip 是拟人化表达，意为严寒控制力增强。

sentences.sentence: The Arctic is not a place to be in the throes of winter; it is hostile to almost all animal life.
sentences.translation: 隆冬时节的北极绝非宜居之地；它对几乎所有动物生命都极不友好。

structure.text: is not a place to be in the throes of winter
is hostile to almost all animal life

difficult_points: 分号连接两个独立分句，后句解释前句为何不宜停留。
in the throes of winter 表示正处于冬季最严酷的阶段。

sentences.sentence: Amphibians would freeze solid here.
sentences.translation: 两栖动物在这里会完全冻僵。
difficult_points: would 表示在这种极端环境下可预期的结果。
freeze solid 中 solid 是结果补语，表示冻成完全坚硬的状态。

sentences.sentence: Nor can reptiles withstand the extreme cold.
sentences.translation: 爬行动物也无法承受这种极寒。
difficult_points: 否定词 Nor 位于句首触发部分倒装，情态动词 can 提到主语 reptiles 前。
Nor 承接上一句，表示爬行动物同样无法生存。

sentences.sentence: And yet there are animals here, animals that exhibit a remarkable tolerance of the most inhospitable conditions on the planet.
sentences.translation: 然而这里确实生活着一些动物，它们对地球上最不宜生存的环境表现出惊人的耐受力。

structure.text: that exhibit a remarkable tolerance of the most inhospitable conditions on the planet

difficult_points: And yet 强烈转折，突出尽管环境严酷仍有动物存在。
第二个 animals 是同位语，that 从句进一步说明这些动物的特征。

sentences.sentence: Less than half a metre beneath the surface of the snow, a furry white creature, no bigger than a hamster, scurries along a tunnel.
sentences.translation: 在雪面下不到半米处，一只不比仓鼠大的白色毛茸茸小动物沿着隧道飞快穿行。

structure.text: Less than half a metre beneath the surface of the snow

difficult_points: 句首是倒装感较强的地点状语，主语直到逗号后才出现。
no bigger than... 是插入的比较短语，补充动物体型；scurry 表示快速碎步移动。

sentences.sentence: It is a collared lemming.
sentences.translation: 它是一只环颈旅鼠。
difficult_points: It 回指上一句雪下穿行的白色小动物。
collared lemming 是物种名称，指颈部有明显色带的旅鼠。

sentences.sentence: It and other members of its family have excavated a complex home within the snow field, but it costs the lemmings a great deal to survive here.
sentences.translation: 它和家族中的其他成员在雪原内部挖出了复杂的家园，但旅鼠要在这里生存必须付出很大代价。

structure.text: It and other members of its family
have excavated a complex home within the snow field
costs the lemmings a great deal

difficult_points: 第一个 It 指该旅鼠，its family 指同类；have excavated 表示已挖建完成。
but 后 it 是形式主语，真正主语是 to survive here；cost A a great deal 表示让 A 付出很大代价。

sentences.sentence: They pay by using some of their precious and scarce food supply to generate heat within their bodies so that their biochemical processes can continue to function efficiently.
sentences.translation: 它们付出的代价，是消耗一部分宝贵而稀缺的食物储备，在体内产生热量，从而让生化过程得以继续高效运转。

structure.text: by using some of their precious and scarce food supply
to generate heat within their bodies
so that their biochemical processes can continue to function efficiently

difficult_points: They 指 lemmings；pay 在此承接上一句的生存代价，而非实际付款。
by using... 说明付出代价的方式，to generate... 表示消耗食物的目的。
so that 引导目的从句，their biochemical processes 是 continue 的逻辑主语。

expressions.meaning_zh: 宝贵而稀缺的食物储备

sentences.sentence: But in order to keep fuel costs to a minimum, they must conserve as much energy as they can.
sentences.translation: 但为了把“燃料”消耗降到最低，它们必须尽可能多地保存能量。

structure.text: But in order to keep fuel costs to a minimum
as much energy as they can

difficult_points: fuel costs 比喻维持体温所消耗的食物能量；keep... to a minimum 表示降至最低。
as much energy as they can 是尽可能多的比较结构，can 后省略 conserve。

expressions.text: conserve as much energy as possible

sentences.sentence: A thick insulating coat of fine fur covering all but the lemmings' eyes achieves this.
sentences.translation: 一层厚厚的细密保温皮毛覆盖了旅鼠除眼睛外的全身，从而实现了这一点。

structure.text: A thick insulating coat of fine fur
covering all but the lemmings' eyes

difficult_points: covering... 是现在分词短语修饰 coat；all but 表示除……以外全部。
this 回指上一句尽量保存能量、降低热量消耗的目标。

sentences.sentence: Fur is the life preserver of the Arctic.
sentences.translation: 皮毛是北极动物的救命保障。

structure.text: the life preserver of the Arctic

difficult_points: life preserver 原指救生设备，此处比喻皮毛是北极哺乳动物的生存保障。
of the Arctic 并非说北极本身拥有皮毛，而是限定其在北极环境中的作用。

sentences.sentence: Only one class of animals has fur - the mammals.
sentences.translation: 只有一类动物拥有皮毛——哺乳动物。
difficult_points: Only 修饰主语而非状语，因此句子不发生倒装。
连字符后的 the mammals 是同位语，说明 one class 的具体类别。

sentences.sentence: Fur is comprised of dense layers of hair follicles.
sentences.translation: 皮毛由密集的毛囊层构成。
difficult_points: be comprised of 是正式表达，表示整体由多个部分构成。
dense layers of... 强调毛囊不仅多，而且呈多层密集分布。

sentences.sentence: Hair is composed of a substance called keratin.
sentences.translation: 毛发由一种叫作角蛋白的物质构成。
difficult_points: is composed of 表示材料构成；called keratin 是过去分词短语修饰 substance。
keratin 是 substance 的名称，即角蛋白。

sentences.sentence: It grows constantly, its roots embedded in the skin and surrounded by nerve fibres so that its owner can sense any movement of the hair.
sentences.translation: 毛发不断生长，其根部嵌在皮肤中并被神经纤维包围，因此动物能感知毛发的任何动静。

structure.text: its roots embedded in the skin and surrounded by nerve fibres
so that its owner can sense any movement of the hair

difficult_points: It 指 Hair；逗号后的 its roots... 是名词加过去分词构成的独立主格。
embedded 与 surrounded 并列描述毛根状态；so that 引出由神经纤维带来的感知结果。

sentences.sentence: It is this precious fur that gives land mammals the edge necessary to survive the harsh Arctic winter.
sentences.translation: 正是这种珍贵的皮毛，赋予陆生哺乳动物熬过北极严冬所必需的优势。

structure.text: It is this precious fur that
necessary to survive the harsh Arctic winter

difficult_points: It is... that... 是强调句，突出真正带来生存优势的是 fur。
give A the edge 是双宾语结构；necessary... 后置修饰 the edge。

sentences.sentence: Without it, wolves, lemmings and arctic foxes alike would surely perish.
sentences.translation: 没有皮毛，狼、旅鼠和北极狐都会死去，无一例外。

structure.text: wolves, lemmings and arctic foxes alike

difficult_points: Without it 是含蓄虚拟条件，it 回指 fur，因此主句使用 would。
alike 放在并列主语后，强调所列动物无一例外。

sentences.sentence: The insulation provided by fur comes not from the fur itself, but largely from the layer of air trapped within the fur.
sentences.translation: 皮毛带来的保温作用并非源于皮毛本身，而主要来自困在皮毛内部的空气层。

structure.text: comes not from the fur itself, but largely from the layer of air

difficult_points: not from... but... 对比保温作用的表面来源与真正来源。
provided by fur 修饰 insulation，trapped within the fur 则修饰 the layer of air。

expressions.text: a layer of air trapped within

sentences.sentence: Air is an extremely effective insulator, which is the same as saying it is a poor conductor, i.e. it has a very limited ability to conduct heat away from a warm surface.
sentences.translation: 空气是一种极有效的隔热材料；换言之，它是不良导体，也就是说，它把热量从温暖表面传走的能力非常有限。

structure.text: Air is an extremely effective insulator
which is the same as saying it is a poor conductor
i.e. it has a very limited ability to conduct heat away from a warm surface

difficult_points: which 回指前面整句结论，并用 the same as saying 换一种方式表达。
第一个 it 指 Air；i.e. 后再次解释 poor conductor 的实际含义。
to conduct... 修饰 ability，conduct heat away from 表示把热量从某表面传走。

sentences.sentence: Studies reveal that if a layer of air of about five centimetres could be held in place close to the skin, it would provide the same insulation as does the impressively dense winter coat of the arctic fox.
sentences.translation: 研究表明，如果能把约五厘米厚的空气层固定在贴近皮肤的位置，它提供的保温效果将与北极狐异常浓密的冬季皮毛相同。

structure.text: that if a layer of air of about five centimetres could be held in place close to the skin
if a layer of air of about five centimetres could be held in place close to the skin
it would provide the same insulation
as does the impressively dense winter coat of the arctic fox

difficult_points: reveal 后是 that 宾语从句，其中又包含 if 条件句和 would 主句。
it 指 a layer of air；could be held 与 would provide 构成对现在假设的虚拟条件。
as does... 为避免重复而倒装，does 代替 provides the same insulation。

expressions.meaning_zh: 提供与……相同的保温效果

sentences.sentence: If an arctic fox or wolf is exposed to an air temperature of about minus ten degrees, the temperature near the tips of the fur will match the air temperature, but at the surface of the skin it will be closer to thirty degrees.
sentences.translation: 如果北极狐或狼暴露在约零下10度的气温中，毛尖附近的温度会与气温一致，但皮肤表面的温度则会接近30度。

structure.text: If an arctic fox or wolf is exposed to an air temperature of about minus ten degrees
the temperature near the tips of the fur
but at the surface of the skin
it will be closer to thirty degrees

difficult_points: If 从句给出测量条件；be exposed to 表示处在某一外界温度下。
but 对比毛尖与皮肤表面的温度；it 回指 the temperature。

expressions.text: be exposed to an air temperature of

sentences.sentence: This represents a temperature difference of around forty degrees.
sentences.translation: 这意味着内外温差约为40度。

structure.text: a temperature difference of around forty degrees

difficult_points: This 回指上一句毛尖约零下10度、皮肤约30度的对比。
represent 在此表示“意味着、相当于”，而不是代表某个群体。

sentences.sentence: Such effective insulation is only made possible by the layer of trapped air contained within the long, fine and densely packed fur.
sentences.translation: 如此高效的保温效果，只有依靠长而细密、排列紧实的皮毛中所困住的空气层才能实现。

structure.text: contained within the long, fine and densely packed fur

difficult_points: make A possible by B 的被动形式强调空气层是保温得以实现的条件。
contained within... 是过去分词短语修饰 air；long、fine、densely packed 并列修饰 fur。

sentences.sentence: But Arctic mammals have more in their arsenal than just fur to protect them from the elements.
sentences.translation: 但北极哺乳动物用来抵御恶劣天气的“武器库”中，并不只有皮毛。

structure.text: more in their arsenal than just fur
to protect them from the elements

difficult_points: arsenal 原指武器库，此处比喻动物拥有多种生存机制。
than just fur 表示除了皮毛还有更多手段；the elements 指恶劣自然天气。

expressions.text: have more in their arsenal than

expressions.meaning_zh: 保护……免受恶劣天气侵袭

sentences.sentence: Unlike amphibians, reptiles and other classes of animals, they are endotherms, meaning they can generate their own body heat.
sentences.translation: 与两栖动物、爬行动物和其他动物类别不同，它们是内温动物，也就是说能自行产生体热。

structure.text: Unlike amphibians, reptiles and other classes of animals
meaning they can generate their own body heat

difficult_points: they 回指 Arctic mammals；Unlike... 是比较状语，突出哺乳动物差异。
meaning... 是现在分词补充解释 endotherms，后面省略连接词 that。

sentences.sentence: This is another of the defining characteristics of mammals.
sentences.translation: 这是哺乳动物的另一项决定性特征。

structure.text: another of the defining characteristics of mammals

difficult_points: This 回指自行产生体热的内温能力。
another of 后接复数 characteristics，表示若干核心特征中的另一项。

sentences.sentence: It is the mammalian ability to generate heat internally that enables the arctic fox or the lemming to remain warm and active in very cold conditions.
sentences.translation: 正是哺乳动物在体内产生热量的能力，使北极狐和旅鼠能在极寒环境中保持温暖和活跃。

structure.text: It is the mammalian ability to generate heat internally that
the arctic fox or the lemming
to remain warm and active in very cold conditions

difficult_points: It is... that... 是强调句，突出产生体热的能力。
enable + 宾语 + to do 构成复合宾语；warm and active 是并列表语。

sentences.sentence: Generating heat internally, Arctic mammals can regulate their body temperature independent of external conditions; this is known as thermoregulation.
sentences.translation: 通过在体内产生热量，北极哺乳动物可以不受外界条件左右地调节体温；这一过程称为体温调节。

structure.text: can regulate their body temperature independent of external conditions

difficult_points: Generating... 的逻辑主语是 Arctic mammals，说明调节体温所凭借的方式。
independent of... 是形容词短语作补充状语；this 回指前一分句描述的机制。

sentences.sentence: When Arctic mammals are cold, they raise their metabolic rate and produce more heat.
sentences.translation: 当北极哺乳动物感到寒冷时，它们会提高代谢率并产生更多热量。
difficult_points: When 从句既说明时间，也体现触发代谢变化的条件。
raise 和 produce 是共用主语 they 的并列谓语。

sentences.sentence: When they are warm, the reverse happens.
sentences.translation: 当它们感觉温暖时，情况则相反。
difficult_points: they 回指 Arctic mammals；When 从句与上一句形成平行对照。
the reverse 代替“降低代谢率并减少产热”的完整过程，避免重复。

sentences.sentence: Together, thermoregulation and fur make Arctic mammals perfectly equipped to face the toughest conditions the Arctic can throw at them.
sentences.translation: 体温调节能力与皮毛共同作用，使北极哺乳动物具备充分条件，应对北极可能带来的最严酷环境。

structure.text: perfectly equipped to face the toughest conditions
the Arctic can throw at them

difficult_points: make + 宾语 + 形容词构成复合宾语，perfectly equipped 描述动物具备的状态。
conditions 后省略关系词 that，the Arctic can throw at them 修饰 conditions。
throw at 是拟人化表达，把北极环境描写成向动物抛出挑战。

expressions.meaning_zh: 向它们施加；让它们面对
